name: insurance brokers processing 5–15 premium payments/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 premium payments/month, manual tracking causes missed payments and client dissatisfaction. We automate payment tracking and reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and reminding clients about monthly premium payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and reminding clients about monthly premium payments.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendar reminders.
